name_en: 🆕 Chip Version Top Quality Replica M83380 Blue. This Brazza wallet exudes a bold character with Monogram Shadow leather. The soft calfskin features the iconic Monogram pattern, with compartments, a coin pocket, and card slots to hold bills and receipts. 10 x 19 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
